prompt: Three gates — this is the big one! I wonder... can you find a way to light the lamp? Have a go!
Three gates! There's more than one way — see if you can find a way to light the lamp.
feedback: You found a way! And here's the secret — there are other ways too. Can you find a different combination?
The lamp is on! But I wonder — is there another way? Try different switches!
Another way! Different switches, same lamp. That's what's special — lots of paths lead to the same answer.
